lines.text_source: Ngh... ghh...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Nn...\n
lines.speaker: Protagonista
lines.intent: gemido de despertar, transição do sonho

lines.text_source: It's... warm...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Nh?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Wh-Who...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: ...calls... to me...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Wait... I'm still...!
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: INITIALIZING AWAKENING PROCESS.
lines.speaker: Sistema

lines.text_source: SYSTEMS YELLOW. RESTARTING IN 5 SECONDS.
lines.speaker: Sistema
lines.base_translation: SISTEMAS EM ALERTA. REINICIANDO EM 5 SEGUNDOS.

lines.text_source: SYSTEM ERROR.
lines.speaker: Sistema

lines.text_source: PROBLEM DETECTED IN AWAKENING PROCESS.\n
lines.speaker: Sistema
lines.base_translation: PROBLEMA DETECTADO NO PROCESSO DE DESPERTAR.\n

lines.text_source: SUBJECT SEVERELY AFFECTED.
lines.speaker: Sistema

lines.text_source: ABORT COMMAND: CANCELLED. \n
lines.speaker: Sistema

lines.text_source: PROCESS UNABLE TO BE TERMINATED.\n
lines.speaker: Sistema

lines.text_source: COMMENCING COUNTDOWN.
lines.speaker: Sistema

lines.text_source: Wh... Where...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Where... am I...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Above me... some kind of... cloth ceiling...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista
lines.base_translation: Acima de mim... uma espécie de... teto de pano...?

lines.text_source: Barely any light...... Or is it just dark out...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista
lines.base_translation: Quase nenhuma luz...... Ou só está escuro lá fora...?

lines.text_source: ...Noise... Sounds like... fire?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: U... Urgh... Everything's... distorted...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Why... am I...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Are you awake?
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Ngh... hh...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: What...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Girl
lines.speaker: sistema

lines.text_source: How are you feeling? I didn't see any injuries,\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Como você está se sentindo? Não vi ferimentos,\n

lines.text_source: but do you feel any pain anywhere?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: mas sente dor em algum lugar?

lines.text_source: ...I suppose you might still be delirious...?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: ...Acho que você ainda pode estar delirando...?

lines.text_source: Who... are you...?
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Oh...
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: That's... Well, how do I put it...? I think that\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Isso... Bem, como eu explico...? Acho que isso\n

lines.text_source: might be a bit too hard to explain right now.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: pode ser difícil demais de explicar agora.

lines.text_source: Well, anyway... do you remember anything about\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Bom, enfim... você lembra de alguma coisa sobre\n

lines.text_source: what happened to you?
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Urgh...
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: Oh--just try to relax...
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: I can tell you everything you want to know later.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Depois eu te conto tudo o que quiser saber.

lines.text_source: Ah... I get it...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: This is... all just... a dream...
lines.speaker: Protagonista
lines.base_translation: Isso é... tudo só... um sonho...

lines.text_source: Just relax for now... and rest.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Nn... hh...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Good night...
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Woman
lines.speaker: sistema

lines.text_source: Oh dear, your room is a mess again...
lines.speaker: Mulher (memória)
lines.base_translation: Ai, ai, seu quarto está uma bagunça de novo...

lines.text_source: Hey, hey, Uncle! I'm here to visit!
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)
lines.base_translation: Ei, ei, Tio! Vim te visitar!

lines.text_source: Heh heh... You better be really happy! Cause today,\n
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)
lines.base_translation: Hehe... É bom você ficar bem feliz! Porque hoje,\n

lines.text_source: I'm gonna cook you your favorite      !
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)

lines.text_source: Hmmm... Then if you still aren't married even\n
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)
lines.base_translation: Hmmm... Então se você ainda não casou nem\n

lines.text_source: when you're really old, I can marry you, OK?
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)
lines.base_translation: quando estiver bem velho, eu caso com você, tá?

lines.text_source: I really do worry... You don't have to stay here.\n
lines.speaker: Mulher (memória)
lines.base_translation: Eu me preocupo mesmo... Você não precisa ficar aqui.\n

lines.text_source: You can always...
lines.speaker: Mulher (memória)

lines.text_source: ...You know you can come back anytime.
lines.speaker: Mulher (memória)

lines.text_source: ...You seem so distant, these days.
lines.speaker: Mulher (memória)

lines.text_source: Back then, it felt like you were always trailing\n
lines.speaker: Mulher (memória)
lines.base_translation: Antes, parecia que você vivia atrás\n

lines.text_source: around after the two of us...
lines.speaker: Mulher (memória)
lines.base_translation: de nós dois o tempo todo...

lines.text_source: Man
lines.speaker: Sistema

lines.text_source: ...You took the medicine, then?
lines.speaker: Homem (memória)

lines.text_source: There'll be a whole new world waiting for you\n
lines.speaker: Homem (memória)
lines.base_translation: Um mundo totalmente novo te aguarda\n

lines.text_source: when you wake up... Hmhmhm.
lines.speaker: Homem (memória)

lines.text_source: Yes... You are the first... and the last...
lines.speaker: Homem (memória)
lines.base_translation: Sim... Você é o primeiro... e o último...

lines.text_source: I'm not gonna make it for you anymore.
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)
lines.base_translation: Eu não vou mais poder fazer isso por você.

lines.text_source: Right?
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: Hee hee, OK.
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)

lines.text_source: You better come. Pinky swear! Cross your heart\n
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)
lines.base_translation: É bom você vir. Promessa de mindinho! Jura\n

lines.text_source: and hope to die!
lines.speaker: Garota (memória)

lines.text_source: It's a promise.
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Nn...
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: That's... right...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: The promise...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: Have to... go...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: She's waiting...
lines.speaker: Protagonista

lines.text_source: She's... waiting... for...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Ah...hah...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: HA-CHOO!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Urgh... S-So cold...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: ...Huh?
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: I blink at the unfamiliar sight.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Wh-Where... am I?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I glance around. Trees, trees, and more trees.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Olho ao redor. Árvores, árvores e mais árvores.\n

lines.text_source: It's a forest, and a pretty dense one at that.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: É uma floresta, e bem densa ainda por cima.

lines.text_source: It feels like the endless trees are swallowing\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Parece que as árvores sem fim engolem\n

lines.text_source: everything else up... even sound.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: todo o resto... até o som.

lines.text_source: Where... exactly am I...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: How did I end up in a place like this...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Como fui parar num lugar assim...?

lines.text_source: Why...? Why...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I frantically search my memories.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Ngh... It's no use. Can't remember. What was\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ngh... Não adianta. Não lembro. O que eu\n

lines.text_source: I doing up until now...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Gah!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: A sudden pain in my foot interrupts my thoughts.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Uma dor súbita no pé interrompe meus pensamentos.\n

lines.text_source: I look down and realize... I'm barefoot.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Olho para baixo e percebo... estou descalço.

lines.text_source: Why...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Ha-choo!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Gah, it's freezing...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Why am I... No, hold on.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Why am I dressed like this...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Out in this cold, in just a flimsy gown...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Nesse frio, só com uma camisola fininha...?

lines.text_source: Not even any underpants...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: H-Hurgh... "Chilly"... d-doesn't even begin\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: to describe it.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I look around, desperate for some way to get out\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Olho em volta, desesperado por um jeito de fugir\n

lines.text_source: of this cold.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Not a single house or a signpost anywhere...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Nenhuma casa, nenhuma placa em lugar nenhum...

lines.text_source: Gah... Urgh...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: My head is splitting, too... Probably related\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Minha cabeça também está latejando... Deve ser\n

lines.text_source: to the empty stomach.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Ah, right. This is all just a dream...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ah, claro. Isso é tudo só um sonho...

lines.text_source: ...Dammit, it's no use. I can't fool myself here.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ...Droga, não adianta. Não dá pra me enganar aqui.

lines.text_source: Somehow, I pull myself together and get back\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: De algum jeito, me recomponho e volto\n

lines.text_source: to my feet.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: No matter how I look at it, this is no dream.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Por mais que eu tente, isto não é sonho nenhum.

lines.text_source: ...Ha-choo! Bwa-CHOO!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Hurgh... Stuck out in this cold with nothing\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Argh... Preso neste frio sem nada\n

lines.text_source: but a robe, and totally naked underneath it.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: além de um robe, e pelado por baixo dele.

lines.text_source: I'm still holding up, but once the sun goes down,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ainda aguento, mas quando o sol se puser,\n

lines.text_source: I'll catch cold for sure. Worst-case scenario,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: vou pegar um resfriado na certa. Na pior das hipóteses,\n

lines.text_source: I'll freeze to death.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: If this isn't a dream, then that tent where I was\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Se isto não é sonho, então aquela tenda onde eu\n

lines.text_source: resting has to be out here somewhere.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: estava deve estar em algum lugar por aqui.

lines.text_source: All things considered, that's probably my best\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Pensando bem, essa é provavelmente minha melhor\n

lines.text_source: shot here...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I want to go back the way I came, but I've got\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Quero voltar pelo caminho que vim, mas não faço\n

lines.text_source: no idea which way that even is.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: What do I do? Should I just... follow some road\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que eu faço? Sigo alguma trilha\n

lines.text_source: and hope for the best? Or wait here for help?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: e torço pelo melhor? Ou espero ajuda aqui?

lines.text_source: If you get lost, rule one is to stay still and\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Quando se perde, a regra um é ficar parado e\n

lines.text_source: wait for help. But the thing is...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: esperar ajuda. Mas o problema é...

lines.text_source: I don't even know if anyone's coming for me...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Não sei nem se alguém vem me procurar...

lines.text_source: Can't really expect a search party when I don't\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Não dá pra esperar um grupo de busca quando nem\n

lines.text_source: even know what the hell I'm doing here myself.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: eu sei o que diabos faço aqui.

lines.text_source: I guess I'll have to risk it if I want to\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Acho que vou ter que arriscar se quiser\n

lines.text_source: get out of here.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I should get moving before it gets any darker.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Melhor me mexer antes que escureça mais.

lines.text_source: Huh?
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: I feel a shiver run down my spine... but this\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sinto um arrepio na espinha... mas desta\n

lines.text_source: time it's not the cold.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: What...? Something felt... weird...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: ...Whoa! Wh-What the--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Oh... just a bird... Phew. Geez, almost gave me\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ah... é só um pássaro... Ufa. Quase me deu\n

lines.text_source: a heart attack.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Nothing serious. What a relief...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Overhead, the birds are still screeching.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Lá em cima, os pássaros ainda grasnam.\n

lines.text_source: They seem pretty worked up about something...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Parecem bem agitados com alguma coisa...

lines.text_source: ...These birds just won't shut up. What's got\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ...Esses pássaros não calam a boca. O que os\n

lines.text_source: them so freaked out...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: *Shiver*
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: ...There it is again.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It feels like... something's watching me.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sinto como se... algo estivesse me observando.

lines.text_source: Urgh... I... feel sick...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: My vision blurs, and I lose my balance.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Minha visão embaça e perco o equilíbrio.\n

lines.text_source: I trip on my own feet, and stumble forward.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Tropeço nos próprios pés e caio pra frente.

lines.text_source: And in that instant--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Whoa--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: *Slash!*
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I hear it just above my head.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ouço logo acima da minha cabeça.\n

lines.text_source: A jarring, violent sound, like metal on metal.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Um som violento e estridente, como metal contra metal.

lines.text_source: Wh... Wh-Wha...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Fallen to one knee, I shift around cautiously\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Caído de joelhos, me viro com cautela\n

lines.text_source: to look back.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: What... is... this...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: A row of sharp jags and points, like honed\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Uma fileira de pontas e gumes afiados, como\n

lines.text_source: blades, gleams in the cold air.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: They're like scissors... or maybe a saw?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: São como tesouras... ou talvez um serrote?

lines.text_source: But saws and scissors can't compare to THAT.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas serrotes e tesouras não chegam perto DAQUILO.\n

lines.text_source: It's bigger than a human arm...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: É maior que um braço humano...

lines.text_source: What the...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: What... is THAT!?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Whatever it is, it's definitely insectoid.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Seja lá o que for, é definitivamente um inseto.

lines.text_source: But... this thing doesn't look like any bug\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas... essa coisa não parece nenhum inseto\n

lines.text_source: I've ever seen.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It's at least ten times... no, a hundred\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: É no mínimo dez vezes... não, cem\n

lines.text_source: times bigger.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: What is... going on...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Revulsion wells up inside me, and my skin crawls.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A repulsa cresce dentro de mim, e minha pele se arrepia.\n

lines.text_source: I just want to look away from this thing.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Só quero desviar o olhar dessa coisa.

lines.text_source: What do I do...? What should I do...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que eu faço...? O que eu devo fazer...?

lines.text_source: Hh... Ah... Aaah--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Without looking away, I jump off the cliffside\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sem desviar o olhar, salto do penhasco\n

lines.text_source: in front of me.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I feel that unnatural sharpness cut through\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: the air just behind me as I leap.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: o ar logo atrás de mim enquanto pulo.

lines.text_source: Aaaaah!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I'm... flying!?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: For a moment, I'm soaring through the air.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Por um momento, deslizo pelo ar.

lines.text_source: I feel myself hit the slope, and tumble down\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sinto-me bater na encosta e rolar\n

lines.text_source: the snowy cliffside.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Guh--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: My back hits the ground hard. The impact knocks\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Minhas costas batem com força no chão. O impacto\n

lines.text_source: the wind out of me, and I choke.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: me tira o fôlego, e eu engasgo.

lines.text_source: Urgh... Ghh...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Ghh!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: My body's screaming in agony, but I don't have\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Meu corpo grita de dor, mas não tenho\n

lines.text_source: time. I stagger to my feet and start running.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: tempo. Cambaleio de pé e começo a correr.

lines.text_source: What was that, what was that, what was that...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que era aquilo, o que era aquilo, o que era aquilo...

lines.text_source: WHAT THE HELL WAS THAT!?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: An insect that massive doesn't exist...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Um inseto tão imenso não existe...\n

lines.text_source: There's no way it COULD exist!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: So this has to be a dream! That was all just\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Então isto só pode ser um sonho! Aquilo foi tudo\n

lines.text_source: some illusion!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I just have to turn and look... and I'll see\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Basta eu me virar e olhar... e vou ver\n

lines.text_source: everyone smiling, waiting for me--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: todo mundo sorrindo, esperando por mim--

lines.text_source: And I look back.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Aaaaaargh! I-I-I-It's gonna...\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It's gonna EAT me!!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I start zigzagging right and left, serpentine,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Começo a ziguezaguear pra direita e esquerda,\n

lines.text_source: trying to keep it guessing.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Hh... hh... H-How far do I have to run!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Hh... hh... Q-Quanto eu ainda tenho que correr!?

lines.text_source: I-I can't... keep this up...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I keep running straight ahead. \n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: But...
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Wha--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Something gives way under my heel.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Aaaaaaaaagghh!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Ghh...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Agh... Did I fall again...? Everything... hurts...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Argh... Caí de novo...? Tudo... dói...

lines.text_source: I shade my eyes with my hand, peering up at the\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Protejo os olhos com a mão, espiando a\n

lines.text_source: light shining from above. Looks like a hole...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: luz que vem de cima. Parece um buraco...

lines.text_source: If that's where I fell from... Must've been\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Se foi de lá que caí... Deve ter sido\n

lines.text_source: a bush or something hiding it...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: um arbusto ou algo escondendo o buraco...

lines.text_source: It'll be tough, but if I climb the wall here,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Vai ser difícil, mas se eu escalar a parede aqui,\n

lines.text_source: maybe I can get back above ground...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: But even if I could get back up, that thing's\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas mesmo se eu subir, aquela coisa\n

lines.text_source: just going to eat me. So...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Strangely enough, the walls are giving off\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: a faint glow. It's dim, but it's helping me\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: um brilho fraco. É tênue, mas me ajuda\n

lines.text_source: see the place.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It looks like some kind of cavern. There's a\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Parece algum tipo de caverna. Há um\n

lines.text_source: tunnel that seems like it goes on for a while.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: túnel que parece seguir por um bom tempo.

lines.text_source: Well, if I can't go up, then I might as well\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Bem, se não posso subir, é melhor\n

lines.text_source: go forward...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Still, even with this dim glow, I can't really\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ainda assim, mesmo com esse brilho fraco, não dá\n

lines.text_source: tell what it's like further inside.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: pra ver bem como é mais pra dentro.

lines.text_source: Maybe it'd be safer to just wait here quietly\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Talvez seja mais seguro só esperar aqui quieto\n

lines.text_source: after all...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: ...That noise... It's getting closer.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: If I hang around here, it'll only hunt me down...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Se eu ficar por aqui, vai só me caçar...\n

lines.text_source: I can't stop now.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: With my decision made, I step forth into\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: the tunnel.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Rrrgh... Why is this happening to me!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Rrgh... Por que isso está acontecendo comigo!?

lines.text_source: Ngh, hah... phew... hah...\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I don't feel it... chasing after me...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Não sinto ela... vindo atrás de mim...

lines.text_source: I finally let myself sit, exhaustion and relief\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Finalmente me deixo sentar, exaustão e alívio\n

lines.text_source: settling in.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Hahh... I'm safe now... Th-This... should be\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Hã... Estou a salvo agora... I-Isto... deve ser\n

lines.text_source: far... enough...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: *Shudder*
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: I cringe instinctively. A sudden chill,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Me encolho por instinto. Um frio súbito,\n

lines.text_source: unpleasantly familiar, runs down my spine.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: My body freezes. I can't move, confronted\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Meu corpo congela. Não consigo me mexer, diante\n

lines.text_source: with something beyond understanding.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Wh... Wh-Wh-Why...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Why is it HERE!?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: The colossal insect is right in front of me.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O inseto colossal está bem na minha frente.

lines.text_source: Did this thing set me up!?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Será que essa coisa me encurralou!?

lines.text_source: But the specifics... don't really matter\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas os detalhes... já não importam\n

lines.text_source: anymore.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Urgh--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It happens in an instant. My back's to the\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Acontece num instante. Estou de costas pra\n

lines.text_source: wall, and any escape is blocked by its\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: parede, e qualquer fuga é bloqueada pelo\n

lines.text_source: sinuous body.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I... can't escape.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It creeps forward warily, as if it's learned\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ele rasteja pra frente com cautela, como se\n

lines.text_source: its lesson from its failed attempts earlier.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: tivesse aprendido a lição das tentativas falhas.

lines.text_source: It leans in, close enough to pull me in with\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ele se inclina, perto o bastante pra me agarrar\n

lines.text_source: a single snap of its jaws... and stops.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: com um só estalo das mandíbulas... e para.

lines.text_source: *Drip*
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Something like saliva is dripping from its jaws.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Algo como saliva pinga das mandíbulas dele.

lines.text_source: Is this... where I die...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Like this... in this senseless situation...\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: eaten by whatever the hell this thing is...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: devorado por seja lá o que for essa coisa...

lines.text_source: The insect's jaws finally click open, gaping\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: As mandíbulas do inseto enfim se abrem, escancaradas\n

lines.text_source: to devour me.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I'm dead--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: *Drip*... *Drip*... *Drip*...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: The insect suddenly darts aside without biting\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O inseto de repente se lança pro lado sem morder,\n

lines.text_source: me, like it's trying to escape something...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: como se tentasse escapar de algo...

lines.text_source: ...and something descends from far above,\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: translucent and massive, as if to crush\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: translúcido e imenso, como que pra esmagar\n

lines.text_source: whatever's below.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It engulfs the massive insect effortlessly.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Engole o inseto colossal sem esforço.

lines.text_source: What... the...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: What is that...? Wh-What's... going on now...?
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O que é aquilo...? Q-Que está... acontecendo agora...?

lines.text_source: I can see the insect writhing and thrashing,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Vejo o inseto se contorcendo e debatendo,\n

lines.text_source: trapped inside its slick, gelatinous body.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: preso dentro do corpo gelatinoso e viscoso.

lines.text_source: The insect was already beyond comprehension,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O inseto já estava além da compreensão,\n

lines.text_source: but this thing... defies all reason. And...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: mas essa coisa... desafia toda lógica. E...

lines.text_source: It's melting...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: This enormous insect's shell, hard as metal,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A carapaça desse inseto enorme, dura feito metal,\n

lines.text_source: is bubbling like it's being dissolved.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: borbulha como se estivesse sendo dissolvida.\n

lines.text_source: It's coming apart inside the slime.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Está se desfazendo dentro do limo.

lines.text_source: Is it... eating the...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: The insect struggles desperately inside this\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O inseto luta desesperadamente dentro dessa\n

lines.text_source: amorphous creature, but its body is almost\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: criatura amorfa, mas o corpo dele está quase\n

lines.text_source: completely digested.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: All I can do is stare blankly, still in shock.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Só consigo encarar, atônito, ainda em choque.

lines.text_source: The insect's face surfaces for an instant,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O rosto do inseto vem à tona por um instante,\n

lines.text_source: but it has no power left. The viscous red\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: mas não tem mais força. O vermelho viscoso\n

lines.text_source: swallows it up.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: ...Am I... safe?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I whisper, in sheer gratitude for still being\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sussurro, em pura gratidão por ainda estar\n

lines.text_source: alive.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I... surviv--!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I can't keep myself from letting out a cheer\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: of relief... until I realize.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: The amorphous creature swells and heaves,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A criatura amorfa incha e se agita,\n

lines.text_source: a short distance away.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: If it's somehow still hungry after that huge\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Se ainda estiver com fome depois daquele inseto\n

lines.text_source: insect, there's no reason it won't go for me\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: enorme, não há razão pra não vir atrás de mim\n

lines.text_source: next.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I need to get out of here, before--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: The amorphous creature begins oozing forward...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A criatura amorfa começa a escorrer pra frente...\n

lines.text_source: towards me.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It stops. Just waiting... like it's curious\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ela para. Só esperando... como se tivesse curiosidade\n

lines.text_source: to see what I do next.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: de ver o que faço em seguida.

lines.text_source: Ngh...
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: Can it hear me? Is it going off vibrations in\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Será que me ouve? Será que sente vibrações\n

lines.text_source: the ground? Any sudden movements, and I'm dead.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: no chão? Qualquer movimento brusco, e eu morro.

lines.text_source: No motion. I keep perfectly still, holding\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Sem me mexer. Fico perfeitamente imóvel, prendendo\n

lines.text_source: my breath.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Its viscous surface begins rippling...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A superfície viscosa começa a ondular...

lines.text_source: ...and little by little, reforms into a\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: familiar shape.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Wha--?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: My voice dies in my throat.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: The face that appears before me is misshapen, glutinous,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O rosto que surge diante de mim é disforme, viscoso,\n

lines.text_source: horrifying... but unmistakably human.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Unfocused eyes fixate on me. Its mouth gasps\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Olhos perdidos se fixam em mim. A boca arqueja\n

lines.text_source: and gapes soundlessly, like a fish drowning\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: e se abre sem som, como um peixe se afogando\n

lines.text_source: in air.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: What... are... you...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Is it... trying to talk...? It just sounds\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Será que... está tentando falar...? Só soa\n

lines.text_source: like air escaping--I can't make out what\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: como ar escapando--não consigo entender o\n

lines.text_source: it's saying.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: By reflex or by curiosity, I move closer to\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Por reflexo ou curiosidade, me aproximo pra\n

lines.text_source: hear what it's saying... and another voice\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ouvir o que diz... e outra voz\n

lines.text_source: rings out.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Cover your eyes and ears!
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Cubra os olhos e os ouvidos!

lines.text_source: The sharp command is followed by a cylindrical\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O comando ríspido é seguido por um objeto\n

lines.text_source: object bouncing on the stone between us.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: cilíndrico quicando na pedra entre nós.\n

lines.text_source: Looks like--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: A grenade...? Gah!?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I instinctively shut my eyes, and clap my hands\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Por instinto, fecho os olhos e tapo\n

lines.text_source: over my ears.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It's too bright to make anything out, but\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Está claro demais pra ver qualquer coisa, mas\n

lines.text_source: I feel the ground shake as if the creature's\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: sinto o chão tremer como se a criatura\n

lines.text_source: writhing.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Is... Is this...?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: A sudden grasp.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Huh...?
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: Someone grabs my hand with an incredible force,\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Alguém agarra minha mão com uma força incrível,\n

lines.text_source: and when I try to pull away, I get yelled at.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: e quando tento me soltar, levo uma bronca.

lines.text_source: You can freeze up later!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: My body's floating in the air...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Meu corpo está flutuando no ar...\n

lines.text_source: It feels like I'm flying again.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: É como se eu estivesse voando de novo.

lines.text_source: I nervously open my eyes, and see someone\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Abro os olhos, nervoso, e vejo alguém\n

lines.text_source: bounding forward, my hand in theirs.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: saltando à frente, minha mão na dela.

lines.text_source: It's so fast...\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It's like we're the wind.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: É como se fôssemos o vento.

lines.text_source: We cut through the air, and the wind roars\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Cortamos o ar, e o vento ruge\n

lines.text_source: past my ears.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: My rescuer glances back to me, as if checking\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Minha salvadora olha pra trás, como que\n

lines.text_source: on me.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: A... woman?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: No... more like a young lady?
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Her face is beautiful, though oddly childish.\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O rosto dela é lindo, embora curiosamente infantil.\n

lines.text_source: Oversized ears... And a fluffy tail.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Orelhas grandes demais... E uma cauda peluda.

lines.text_source: There's something... ethereal about her.\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I can't look away.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Even in this incredible situation, it feels\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: like time's stopped.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Then, suddenly, her brow furrows.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Então, de repente, ela franze a testa.

lines.text_source: I glance back, unsure of what she's looking at...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Olho pra trás, sem saber o que ela está vendo...

lines.text_source: Aaagh--
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: That amorphous creature surges forward, closing\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Aquela criatura amorfa avança, se aproximando\n

lines.text_source: in on us like some kind of predatory wave.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: de nós como uma onda predadora.

lines.text_source: In this linear cavern, there's nowhere else\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Nesta caverna estreita, não há pra onde\n

lines.text_source: to run.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: It's gonna catch up--!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: But the girl's already seen it. She whips\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Mas a garota já viu. Ela saca\n

lines.text_source: another cylinder from her waist, and\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: outro cilindro da cintura e o\n

lines.text_source: throws it behind us.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: The blinding flash and the explosion follow\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: O clarão ofuscante e a explosão vêm\n

lines.text_source: almost instantly.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Gyaaaagh!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Now's our chance!
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Hahh... hh... hahh...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: We're outside... I-I'm finally safe...
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Estamos do lado de fora... E-Estou enfim a salvo...

lines.text_source: My legs give out. I collapse onto the snowy\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Minhas pernas cedem. Desabo na neve\n

lines.text_source: ground.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I can barely even believe I was able to run\n
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: as much as I did.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: I guess humans really can do anything when\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Acho que humanos conseguem qualquer coisa quando\n

lines.text_source: their lives are on the line...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: The girl's exhausted too--can't blame her--\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: A garota também está exausta--não dá pra culpá-la--\n

lines.text_source: and she takes a seat, catching her breath.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: e se senta, recuperando o fôlego.

lines.text_source: ...She saved my life... I should at least\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: ...Ela salvou minha vida... Eu deveria pelo menos\n

lines.text_source: thank her properly.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Th-Thank you so much for saving me...
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Did she even hear me? My throat is raspy and\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Será que ela me ouviu? Minha garganta está rouca e\n

lines.text_source: raw, and I can't speak up that well.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: áspera, e não consigo falar muito alto.

lines.text_source: She notices, and turns towards me.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ela percebe e se vira pra mim.

lines.text_source: She has a strange look on her face, like she's\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Tem uma expressão estranha no rosto, como se\n

lines.text_source: seen something she wasn't expecting to.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: tivesse visto algo que não esperava.

lines.text_source: Ah... Seeing her face again like this...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Ah... Vendo o rosto dela assim de novo...\n

lines.text_source: There really is something beautiful about her.
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Tem mesmo algo de bonito nela.

lines.text_source: That slightly confused expression, too...\n
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Aquela expressão um tanto confusa, também...\n

lines.text_source: Wow, she's cute.
lines.speaker: Man

lines.text_source: Girl
lines.speaker: sistema

lines.text_source: Is there something wrong with my face?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Tem algo de errado com meu rosto?

lines.text_source: O-Oh, no, not really...
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Still, though.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: I take my eyes off you for just a moment and\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Tiro os olhos de você por um só instante e\n

lines.text_source: you disappear, but I never imagined something\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: você some, mas nunca imaginei uma coisa\n

lines.text_source: like this.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: I'm glad I made it in time, but in the future...\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ainda bem que cheguei a tempo, mas no futuro...\n

lines.text_source: I think I'd prefer you don't cause me so much\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: acho que prefiro que você não me dê tanto\n

lines.text_source: trouble.
lines.speaker: Haku

lines.text_source: Urgh... I'm sorry.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Wait, take her eyes off me...?\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Espera, tirar os olhos de mim...?\n

lines.text_source: And I disappeared?
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: What does she mean by that? She seems somehow...\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: O que ela quer dizer com isso? Ela parece de algum\n

lines.text_source: familiar, too...
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Does that mean you know who I am...?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Quer dizer que você sabe quem eu sou...?

lines.text_source: If you know who I am, where I'm from, please--\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Se você sabe quem eu sou, de onde venho, por favor--\n

lines.text_source: tell me.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Huh...? Oh...
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Who am I? Where am I? What was that thing\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Quem sou eu? Onde estou? O que era aquela coisa\n

lines.text_source: that attacked me? What was--I mean, how--
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: que me atacou? O que era--quer dizer, como--

lines.text_source: Ngh... I'm trying to ask all my questions\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ngh... Tento fazer todas as perguntas\n

lines.text_source: at once, and none of them are coming out\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: de uma vez, e nenhuma sai\n

lines.text_source: right.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: I'm--
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: The girl stands with a troubled smile on her\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: A garota fica de pé com um sorriso aflito no\n

lines.text_source: face, and extends her hand to me.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: rosto e estende a mão pra mim.

lines.text_source: We should head back for now.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: If you stay out here dressed like that,\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Se você ficar aqui fora vestido assim,\n

lines.text_source: you're going to end up with a cold.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Dressed...?
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: The cold air hits me all at once again, and\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: O ar gelado me atinge de novo de uma vez, e\n

lines.text_source: I finally remember the state I'm in.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: finalmente lembro o estado em que estou.

lines.text_source: Come to think of it, have I really been\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Pensando bem, será que andei mesmo\n

lines.text_source: flailing around this whole forest in this\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: perambulando por toda esta floresta nesta\n

lines.text_source: flimsy thing...?
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: Hah... Ha-CHOO!
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: ...Hee hee.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: She lets out a laugh, clear as a bell, at the\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ela solta uma risada, clara como um sino, com o\n

lines.text_source: sound of my sneeze echoing through the forest.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: som do meu espirro ecoando pela floresta.

lines.text_source: Here.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: She takes my hand with her pale, delicate fingers,\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ela toma minha mão com seus dedos pálidos e delicados,\n

lines.text_source: and pulls me to my feet.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: e me ajuda a ficar de pé.

lines.text_source: Let's go.
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: H-Hey...
lines.speaker: Kuon

lines.text_source: I shift my hand slightly, squeezing back at her\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Movo a mão de leve, apertando de volta o\n

lines.text_source: grip. That lone touch of warmth...
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: aperto dela. Aquele único toque de calor...

lines.text_source: ...I couldn't have known what lay ahead of us.\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: ...Eu não tinha como saber o que nos aguardava.\n

lines.text_source: That this was only the beginning.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Que aquilo era só o começo.
